🎯 Entry Signal Quality (8)

HIGH
30m RSI > 70 at Entry
38.9% WR (18 trades, -$849.64). Strong signal to BLOCK overbought entries on 30m.
→ ACTION: Block entries when 30m RSI > 70
MED
SuperTrend Multi-TF Alignment
Aligned (1H+4H+D all bull): 40.7% WR (54 trades, -$1731.33) vs Misaligned: 57.8% WR (320 trades, $4541.22). Modest alignment effect.
MED
Multi-TF Signal Alignment
80%+ aligned: 47.2% WR (195 trades) vs <50%: 64.1% WR (39 trades). Alignment matters but isn't decisive alone.
LOW
15m RSI > 70 at Entry
45.0% WR (20 trades, -$606.15). Consider adding a caution gate.
LOW
4H EMA Bull Cross at Entry
53.4% WR (296 trades, $1125.09). 4H bull cross alone doesn't guarantee wins.
LOW
4H EMA Bear Cross at Entry
63.2% WR (95 trades, $2052.63). Mixed results entering against 4H trend.
LOW
4H EMA Depth
Shallow (<4): 46.7% WR (15) vs Deep (8+): 56.9% WR (355). Deep EMA stack on 4H confirms trend conviction.
LOW
TD Sequential Exhaustion Near Completion (7+)
Entries when any TF has prep count >= 7: 55.6% WR (54 trades, $1160.64). Exhaustion count doesn't strongly predict failure.

🚪 Exit & Trade Management (5)

HIGH
MFE Capture Efficiency
Avg capture: -576% of MFE. Avg left on table: 1.09% per trade. CRITICAL: exits are capturing less than a third of available move. Trail stops may be too tight.
→ ACTION: Widen trail stop or add runner logic to capture more of the move
HIGH
Worst Exit Signal
"above_trigger" — 0.0% WR, -$106.19 avg across 3 trades. This exit is not working well.
→ ACTION: Review and potentially disable or modify this exit trigger
MED
MAE-Based Stop Loss Optimization
Avg winner drawdown: -1.13%, max winner drawdown: -0.01%. Avg loser drawdown: -2.79%. Some winners have significant drawdowns — be careful tightening stops too much.
MED
Trim Effectiveness
Trimmed trades: 85.7% WR, $89.14 avg (238 trades). Untrimmed: 9.2% WR, -$117.89 avg (153 trades). Trimming is protecting profits effectively.
MED
Best Exit Signal
"PHASE_LEAVE_100" — 100.0% WR, $128.80 avg across 43 trades. This exit trigger produces the best outcomes.
→ ACTION: Lower threshold to trigger this exit more often

HIGH
Worst Market Regime
STRONG_BULL — 37.2% WR across 43 trades (-$1172.97). Consider reducing activity or tightening entry gates.

MED

MED
Setup Grade Validation
Best grade: Confirmed at 56.4% WR (266 trades). Worst grade: Speculative at 46.2% WR (13 trades). Grading differentiates modestly.
MED
RVOL at Entry
Low RVOL (<0.8): 75.0% WR (16 trades). High RVOL (1.5+): 53.3% WR (300 trades). Volume alone doesn't differentiate outcomes.
MED
LONG vs SHORT Performance
LONG: 56.0% WR (368 trades, $3307.82). SHORT: 52.2% WR (23 trades, -$130.09). Both directions performing comparably.
LOW

⚙ System-Level (4)

HIGH
Risk/Reward Ratio
Avg win: $108.08, avg loss: -$117.82. R:R = 0.92:1. Losses are bigger than wins — need better exits or tighter stops.
→ ACTION: Tighten stop losses and/or widen profit targets
HIGH
Consecutive Loss Streak
Max consecutive losses: 8. Max consecutive wins: 8. 6+ loss streak indicates potential regime-mismatch or over-trading. Consider adding a circuit breaker.

LOW

$8.13 per trade across 391 trades. System has positive expectancy — keep trading.
LOW
